spec.name: The Red Room
spec.description: It takes you a moment to realize that the red glow here is coming from a round portal on the floor. It looks almost as if someone had painted a picture of a dirt running through a field on the floor of this room. Oddly enough, it is so realistic you can feel the wind in the field coming out of the picture.

extra_descs.description: It looks as if you could go down into it... but you can't be sure of where you will end up, or if you can get back.
